title: Constrained scheduling optimizer
description: A public scheduling tool for university residence-life staff that cut rota construction from hours to seconds. Availability, coverage, and fairness were modeled as a constrained combinatorial optimization problem solved with warm-start stochastic local search.

title: Computational statistical-physics curriculum
description: A week-long, Python-based course introducing stochastic simulation, entropy, phase transitions, and neural networks to students from non-physics backgrounds, built around hands-on notebook labs that emphasize model-building and intuition.
